paragraphs.es: Tanya está muy asustada en el yate de Quentin. Descubre que Quentin y sus amigos planean matarla por su dinero, y que Greg, su esposo, está involucrado en el plan. Niccolò es parte del grupo. Tanya encuentra el arma que vio antes. Cuando Niccolò y otros hombres vienen a buscarla, Tanya les dispara. Mata a Quentin, a Niccolò y a varios de sus cómplices. Trata de escapar del yate a un bote pequeño, pero se resbala, se golpea la cabeza y cae al agua. Tanya se ahoga. Su cuerpo es uno de los que Daphne encuentra en el primer episodio.
paragraphs.en: Tanya is very scared on Quentin's yacht. She discovers that Quentin and his friends plan to kill her for her money, and that Greg, her husband, is involved in the plan. Niccolò is part of the group. Tanya finds the gun she saw before. When Niccolò and other men come for her, Tanya shoots them. She kills Quentin, Niccolò, and several of their accomplices. She tries to escape from the yacht to a small boat, but she slips, hits her head, and falls into the water. Tanya drowns. Her body is one of the ones Daphne finds in the first episode.

paragraphs.es: Portia está atrapada con Jack. Él la lleva a un aeropuerto y le dice que se vaya a casa y no haga preguntas. Le advierte que Quentin y sus amigos son peligrosos. Portia está confundida y asustada, pero logra irse. En el aeropuerto, ve a Albie.
paragraphs.en: Portia is trapped with Jack. He takes her to an airport and tells her to go home and not ask questions. He warns her that Quentin and his friends are dangerous. Portia is confused and scared, but she manages to leave. At the airport, she sees Albie.

paragraphs.es: Ethan finalmente confronta a Cameron. Lo acusa de acostarse con Harper. Cameron lo niega, pero Ethan no le cree. Pelean en el mar. Más tarde, Ethan habla con Daphne. Daphne le da a entender que ella también tiene sus secretos y que a veces hay que hacer cosas para que el matrimonio funcione. Ethan y Harper tienen una conversación. Harper admite que besó a Cameron. Ethan está herido, pero parece que deciden intentar seguir adelante. Al final, se les ve más cariñosos.
paragraphs.en: Ethan finally confronts Cameron. He accuses him of sleeping with Harper. Cameron denies it, but Ethan doesn't believe him. They fight in the sea. Later, Ethan talks with Daphne. Daphne hints that she also has her secrets and that sometimes you have to do things to make a marriage work. Ethan and Harper have a conversation. Harper admits that she kissed Cameron. Ethan is hurt, but it seems they decide to try to move forward. By the end, they are seen being more affectionate.

paragraphs.es: Albie le pide a su padre, Dominic, el dinero para Lucia. Dominic finalmente accede, con la condición de que Albie ayude a que su madre lo perdone. Albie le da el dinero a Lucia. Lucia está muy feliz y le agradece. Más tarde, en el aeropuerto, Albie ve a Lucia. Ella lo saluda amistosamente pero se va con otra amiga, Mia. Parece que Lucia usó a Albie para conseguir el dinero y ahora sigue con su vida. Albie se da cuenta de esto.
paragraphs.en: Albie asks his father, Dominic, for the money for Lucia. Dominic finally agrees, on the condition that Albie help his mother forgive him. Albie gives the money to Lucia. Lucia is very happy and thanks him. Later, at the airport, Albie sees Lucia. She greets him warmly but leaves with another friend, Mia. It seems that Lucia used Albie to get the money and is now moving on with her life. Albie realizes this.

paragraphs.es: Mia tiene éxito como cantante en el hotel. Valentina, la gerente, está contenta con ella y continúan su relación.
paragraphs.en: Mia is successful as a singer at the hotel. Valentina, the manager, is happy with her and they continue their relationship.

paragraphs.es: Al final, los huéspedes que sobreviven se van del White Lotus. Portia ve a Albie en el aeropuerto y se acercan. Harper y Ethan parecen haber superado su crisis, al menos por ahora. Dominic espera poder reconciliarse con su esposa. Bert se despide de Sicilia.
paragraphs.en: In the end, the surviving guests leave the White Lotus. Portia sees Albie at the airport and they approach each other. Harper and Ethan seem to have gotten through their crisis, at least for now. Dominic hopes to reconcile with his wife. Bert says goodbye to Sicily.

paragraphs.es: Valentina sigue trabajando en el hotel, ahora con Mia como la cantante principal del bar. Y la vacación termina, con varias muertes y muchos secretos.
paragraphs.en: Valentina continues working at the hotel, now with Mia as the main singer in the bar. And the vacation ends, with several deaths and many secrets.
